name: Piercing Gilbreath's Conjecture: From Deep Number Theory Insights to Fintech and Cybersecurity

description: arXiv:2607.04166v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: I propose a new methodology to attack the fascinating Gilbreath's conjecture about prime numbers, first posted in 1878 and unsolved to this day. The problem statement is rudimentary: kids can understand it. However, despite decades of research, almost no progress has been made. This paper changes the game by presenting a new approach bas...
author: Vincent Granville
